approach: The challenge requires a two-step workflow: first, initialize a session by sending a POST request to /api/marble/session with a label, then use the returned runId and handoffKey to confirm the session via a PUT request to /api/marble/confirm. The evidence confirms these are the only two endpoints needed.
evidenceUsed: Exact-copy relations between session response and confirm request fields (runId, handoffKey)
uncertainties: None, the workflow is deterministic and fully documented in the evidence.
